extortion.description: Hongji Metal is a professional industrial manufacturing company with corporate headquarters located in Shanghai, China. Founded in Jan 2000, Hongji is committed to producing diversified metal components, assembled products, services and solutions for the Home Security, Automotive, Consumer goods, Home Electronics industries and more. We provide customers with a one-stop solution to your manufacturing requirements andare devoted to a continuous improvement philosophy byutilizing advanced technological methodologies and unsurpassed quality control systems.
